title: toona ciliata var. pubescens
intro: Toona ciliata var. pubescens, commonly known as the Tasmanian cedar, is a variety of the Toona ciliata tree native to Australia and New Zealand. It is a deciduous tree with aromatic timber and has been used for its medicinal and therapeutic properties. The medicinal properties of Toona ciliata var. pubescens are attributed to its essential oils, which have been shown to possess anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The herbal preparations of the plant include teas, tinctures, and essential oil extracts, which can be used to aid in stress relief, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system.
